name: smartagro-crm
description: White-label CRM — NestJS 11 + Prisma 6 + Next.js 16 on Supabase Postgres

scripts.install:all: npm --prefix shared install && npm --prefix shared run build && npm --prefix Backend install && npm --prefix Frontend install
scripts.build: npm --prefix shared run build && npm --prefix Backend run build && npm --prefix Frontend run build
scripts.openapi: npm --prefix Backend run openapi:generate && npm --prefix Frontend run api:types
